$comment: Pinned upstream naive Linux x64 build. v0.3.0+ ct-naive container
fetches and integrity-checks this exact tarball at image-build
time. The upstream_tag MUST match COOL-TUNNEL/naive.upstream.json
in the macOS client repo — wire-level compatibility is the whole
point of the v0.3.0 architecture cut. Bump both sides together.
How to refresh on a naive version bump (run from the repo root):
# paste url/sha/size below + bump upstream_tag + fetched_at
